headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.googleusercontent.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.googleapis.com https://sheets.googleapis.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
